_comment_kinds: Allowed kind values: skill, agent, cargo-test, script, manual, doc-section.
_comment_script: kind:script 'command' contains exactly ONE scripts/* path token.
_comment_manual: kind:manual entries include a non-empty 'steps' array.

steps: Launch the Toaster dev app with `pwsh scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1`.
Right-click any keep-segment in the timeline to open the segment context menu.
Confirm a numeric input and slider labelled 'Stretch' are present, both bound to the same value, both clamped to [0.5, 2.0].
Drag the slider to 1.5; confirm the numeric input updates to 1.50 and the preview audio re-renders with audibly faster playback over that segment.
Type 1.0 into the numeric input and blur; confirm the slider snaps back to 1.0.
Type 3.0 into the numeric input and blur; confirm the value is clamped to 2.0 (not rejected outright is acceptable per R-001-b).
Click the 'Reset' button; confirm the value returns to 1.0 and the preview re-renders at natural speed.
Confirm the `<video>` element's source was NOT swapped at any point (AGENTS.md non-negotiable).
